description: Add pi-config tests: readPiConfig, writePiConfig, readPiAuth with env var overrides

description: Add parseAndInsertStories tests (9 tests, all pass). Coverage stable at ~0.47 but below previous peak due to pi-dependency coverage variability.

asi.hypothesis: parseAndInsertStories tests exercise STORIES_JSON parsing paths, but aggregate coverage is dominated by pi dependency code noise
asi.observation: coverage fluctuates ±0.005 between runs due to pi dependency code exercising different paths with parallel tests
asi.rollback_reason: coverage slightly below previous best; within noise floor
asi.next_action_hint: Focus on pure tamandua-specific coverage metric or accept that pi dependencies cap the achievable score
